title: DPI string parameter and readmemh
body:
---


Author Name: **Stefan Wallentowitz** (@wallento)
Original Redmine Issue: 1040 from https://www.veripool.org
Original Date: 2016-02-22
Original Assignee: Stefan Wallentowitz (@wallento)

---

Hi,

I am using this construct:
```
export "DPI-C" task do_readmemh_file;
    
task do_readmemh_file;
    input string file;
    $readmemh(file, mem);
endtask

```

It generates @VL_READMEM_N@ which does not exist. Do I miss anything? I found an ugly workaround with an integer array and memcpy, but I am wondering if I am missing something.

Thanks,
Stefan
